sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60797" key="kumorrw/c" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῡμο-ρρώξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῶγος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n60797.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">breaking the waves</tr_>, Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:1:46" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.46</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
